projectDescription: A Binance spot wallet toolkit providing an interactive REPL and reference broker-adapter order-management flows for backtest-kit, encoding the correct cancel-verify-sell sequence to safely exit positions.
keyFeatures: Interactive REPL for live exchange operations (buy/sell/flatten/inspect) without touching the trading engine
Reference broker-adapter implementation for backtest-kit with correct order-management sequence
cancel-verify-sell pattern: cancel all open orders, verify clean book, then sell — prevents insufficient-balance errors on spot
Poll-with-timeout and market-order fallback: limit orders never stay resting on the book after a timeout
clientOrderId (signalId) reconciliation across retries to prevent duplicate fills on lost responses
Per-symbol serialized execution queue in WalletPublicService preventing race conditions
TTL-cached price (30s), orders (10m), and PnL (10m) to reduce API load
Daily PnL estimation with VWAP from 1h candles and partial-fill cross-day matching
OCO (take-profit + stop-loss) order placement via commitTrade
DI-wired service layer using di-kit for clean dependency injection
publicApiSurface: wallet.walletPublicService.commitTrade(symbol, amountUSDT, takeProfitPrice, stopLossPrice) => Promise<0 | { status, content }>
wallet.walletPrivateService.commitTrade(symbol, amountUSDT, averagePrice, takeProfitPrice, stopLossPrice) => Promise<0 | { status, content }>
COMMIT_BUY_FN({ amountUSDT, averagePrice, symbol }, binance) => Promise<number>
COMMIT_SELL_FN({ amountUSDT, averagePrice, symbol }, binance) => Promise<number>
COMMIT_TRADE_FN({ amountUSDT, averagePrice, takeProfitPrice, stopLossPrice, symbol }, binance) => Promise<0 | { status, content }>
IOrderData: { symbol, orderId, status, amount, executedQty, price, time, side }
IDailyPnL: { date, pnl, walletCost, amountQty, amountUSDT, averagePrice }
